jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Extramarks
jsonLd.description:
Extramarks, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Extramarks:
Extramarks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks!
